rulings.Case Title: JORIE CRAIG VS. TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 21, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, MATTHEW EVA, WADE EVA, MONICA LIOTTA, and, RICHARD TIPTON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained in part with ten days leave to amend as to the fourteenth and sixteenth causes of action. Demurrer overruled as to the first, seventh, eleventh, twelth, and thirteenth causes of action. Demurrer is sustained as to the fourteenth cause of action for "habitability tort" which is not a cause of action. Unclear whether claim is for general negligence, intentional infliction of emotional distress, or warranty of habitability. Sustained as to the sixteenth cause of action because negligence per se is not an independent cause of action. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JORIE CRAIG VS. TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 21, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, MATTHEW EVA, WADE EVA, MONICA LIOTTA, and, RICHARD TIPTON Motion To Strike. Motion is denied as non-compliant with CRC Rule 3.1113(a) and off calendar as moot based on ruling on demurrer. =(302/CWW)
